name: channel-alf-planner
description: Help a Channel Talk AX Consultant prepare a customer's ALF rollout from support-policy text.

interface.shortDescription: Prepare a customer's Channel Talk ALF rollout plan.
interface.longDescription: Helps a Channel Talk AX Consultant convert a customer's pasted FAQ, policy, support notes, and optional anonymized inquiries into inquiry taxonomy, FAQ gaps, ALF Rule candidates, ALF Task candidates, answer-quality risks, escalation triggers, and next setup actions before ALF rollout. The customer-side e-commerce CX operations manager is treated as the implementation stakeholder, not the primary plugin user.
defaultPrompt: Plan ALF setup from these support notes.
Find FAQ gaps and ALF rule candidates.
Turn these inquiries into a Channel Talk plan.
